calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P Dias CSR: Scott Hughes.
Ryan D. Krohn, Esq. for Plaintiff: George Ballard.
Plaintiff's witness: Alan Fong of State Compensation Insurance Fund was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Walnut Creek Locksmith, Inc., a corporation aka AA Speedy Locksmith & Security; Speedy Locksmiths, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages: $22,633.72
Prejudgment Interest $5,177.00
Attorney Fees: $660.00
Costs: $468.80
Motion fees previously awarded to plaintiff: $586.30
Total Judgment: $29,525.82
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Mo For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents & Truth Of Facts Be Admitted & Compelling Responses To Interrogs & Production Of Documents & For Monetary Sanctions Including Attys' Fees
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted and to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $586.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
